zh.lifeSummary: 當Anastasia de Percy於1216年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，她的父親William de Percy24歲，母親Joan de Briwere26歲。她和Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1272年4月28日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾托普可利福，埋葬在英國越可爾托普可利福。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Anastasia de Percy was born in 1216, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, her father, William de Percy, was 24 and her mother, Joan de Briwere, was 26. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham. She died before 28 April 1272, in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anastasia de Percy est née en 1216, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William de Percy, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Briwere, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham. Elle est décédée avant 28 avril 1272, à Topcliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Topcliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hatte mit Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 28. April 1272 in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham. Morì prima del 28 aprile 1272, nel Topcliffe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anastasia de Percyが1216年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父William de Percyは24歳，母Joan de Briwereは26歳であった。彼女はRalph FitzRandolph Lord Middlehamとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1272年4月28日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアトプクリフで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアトプクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anastasia de Percy(이)가 1216년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Percy(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Briwere(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 4월 28일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토pc리프에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 토pc리프에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anastasia de Percy родилась в 1216 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Percy было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Briwere, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham. Она умерла перед 28 апрель 1272 г. в местности топклифф, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности топклифф, еркшир, Англия.
